questions.question: Why do tailors use the soft inch-tape instead of a wooden ruler for taking body measurements?
sounds_right: tape mud jaati hai na, body ke gol gol ghum jaati hai
ruler seedha hota hai, body gol hai, isliye tape
sounds_confused: ruler chhota padta hai isliye
tape sasti aati hai

questions.question: Suppose you are measuring for a blouse -- which places on the body will you measure, and where exactly does the bust measurement go?
sounds_right: chhati, kamar, aur hip ka naap -- chhati mein sabse ubhri jagah pe tape ghumana
bust waist hip, aur bust ka naap sabse full jagah se lena, peeche se barabar rakhna
sounds_confused: bas kandhe ka naap kaafi hai
chhati mein upar ke taraf se, gale ke paas se lena

questions.question: Where on the body do you take the waist measurement -- how do you find the right spot?
sounds_right: kamar mein jahan sabse patla hai, nabhi ke thoda upar
jo sabse patli jagah hai wahan tape ghumao, seedha rakhna
sounds_confused: jahan pet sabse bada hai wahan se
hip ke paas se hi le lete hain

questions.question: Suppose the blouse comes out tight at the chest even though you measured -- what might have gone wrong when measuring?
sounds_right: tape zyada tight kheench diya hoga, thoda dheela rakhna tha
naap ke time tape kas ke pakda hoga, ek ungli jaani chahiye andar
sounds_confused: tape chhoti hogi
machine ne galat sil diya hoga

questions.question: When the tape is around the body, how do you know it is sitting just right -- not too loose, not too tight?
sounds_right: ek ungli tape ke neeche aaram se jaani chahiye
tape body pe tike lekin kase nahi, aur seedha rahe, tedha nahi
sounds_confused: jitna tight utna sahi naap
dheela hi rakho hamesha, baad mein kam kar lenge

questions.question: Before cutting a piece of cloth, why do we look at the fabric's direction first? What happens if we cut it any which way?
sounds_right: kapde ki ek seedhi disha hoti hai, usi mein katna chahiye nahi to kapda tedha latakta hai
kinare wali seedhi disha mein kaato, tirchha kaatoge to kapda khinch ke tedha ho jayega
sounds_confused: koi farak nahi padta, kapda to kapda hai
jaise fit ho jaye waise kaat lo, kapda bachta hai

questions.question: If a kurti hangs crooked and twists to one side after a wash, what could the reason be from the cutting stage?
sounds_right: kaatne mein disha galat thi, tirchha kat gaya hoga
grain ke hisaab se nahi kata isliye tedha ho gaya
sounds_confused: dhone se kapda kharab ho gaya, cutting se kya lena dena
silai kamzor thi isliye

questions.question: When you cut the cloth, do you cut exactly on the chalk line of the body measurement? Why or why not?
sounds_right: nahi, line ke bahar thoda chhod ke kaatna hai, silai ke liye jagah chahiye na
aadha inch bahar se kaato, wahi kapda silai mein jaata hai
sounds_confused: haan bilkul line pe kaato, tabhi to naap sahi rahega
andar ki taraf se kaato to fit accha aata hai

questions.question: A customer says her suit has become a little tight and asks if it can be loosened. What in your cutting decides whether that is possible?
sounds_right: agar seam mein margin chhoda tha to khol ke bada kar sakte hain
gunjaish rakhi ho kaatne mein to nikal sakte hain, warna nahi
sounds_confused: naya kapda jod denge kahin se bhi
tight ho gaya to kuch nahi ho sakta kabhi

questions.question: While the machine is running, what should your hands be doing with the fabric -- and what should they never do?
sounds_right: haath se bas seedha rakhna hai, kheenchna nahi -- machine khud aage badhati hai
guide karna hai bas, kheenchoge to sui tedhi ho jaati hai aur line bhi
sounds_confused: kheench ke nikalna padta hai warna ruk jaata hai
jitna zor se pakdo utna seedha silta hai

questions.question: What do you do at the very start and very end of a seam so the stitching never opens up?
sounds_right: shuru aur aakhir mein thoda ulta chala ke lock karna hai
back karke do teen taanke wapas lena, tab silai nahi khulti
sounds_confused: bas gaanth baandh do dhaage mein, kaafi hai
kuch nahi karna, machine khud pakad leti hai
